workbench.dashboard_subtitle: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your projects today.

about.title: About GoWind Content Hub
about.subtitle: Powerful Multi-Tenant Enterprise Content Hub
about.description: GoWind Content Hub is a Headless content platform designed specifically for modern enterprises, providing a flexible and scalable content management solution to help enterprises achieve efficient content management and global distribution.
about.about_us_desc_1: GoWind Content Hub is a Headless content platform designed specifically for modern enterprises, dedicated to providing flexible and scalable content management solutions for enterprises.
about.about_us_desc_2: We deeply understand the content management needs of enterprises, and help enterprises easily manage and publish content through multi-tenant architecture, enterprise-level security and high-performance APIs.
about.about_us_desc_3: Whether you are a small team or a large enterprise, GoWind Content Hub can provide you with a professional content management experience.
about.features_desc: GoWind Content Hub provides enterprise-grade content management features to meet all your needs
about.feature_content_desc: Support for multiple content types and custom fields to meet complex content management requirements
about.feature_multi_tenant_desc: Complete tenant isolation and resource sharing, supporting management of multiple organizations on a single platform
about.feature_security_desc: Role-based access control, data encryption, and audit logs ensure data security
about.feature_api_desc: RESTful API support for seamless integration with third-party services and applications
about.feature_collaboration_desc: Team members can edit and comment in real-time, improving work efficiency
about.feature_analytics_desc: Detailed content performance analytics and user behavior data to help optimize your content
about.team_desc: An outstanding team of experienced engineers and product specialists
about.values_desc: These values guide our decisions and actions, helping us create maximum value for our customers
about.value_innovation_desc: We continuously innovate and explore the latest technologies and methodologies to provide cutting-edge solutions
about.value_reliability_desc: We are committed to providing stable and reliable services to ensure your business runs continuously
about.value_customer_desc: Your success is our success. We are fully committed to supporting your business goals
about.cta_desc: Explore all features of GoWind Content Hub now, or contact our team for professional advice

contact.description: For support and business inquiries, please contact us via the channels below.

disclaimer.item_2: You are responsible for independent verification before use.
disclaimer.item_3: We are not liable for losses resulting from use of this site.

privacy.description: This page explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.item_1: We only collect data required for core product functionality.
privacy.item_2: We do not sell personal information to third parties.
privacy.item_3: You may request data export or deletion through support.

terms.description: By using this site, you agree to the following terms of service.
terms.item_1: Use the product in compliance with applicable laws and regulations.
terms.item_2: Do not abuse services, disrupt systems, or violate others' rights.
terms.item_3: We may update these terms and publish changes on this page.
